focus: Abolish the hub-router layer entirely (agenda #1): take _apply_deep_skill_routing_layer to its extreme and stress what breaks/improves
noveltyJustification: First lateral pass; tier-split reframe (F4) and four second-order costs (F2) are not in 021/run2-archive/research.md

label: _apply_deep_skill_routing_layer is the one shipped precedent and is non-generalizable
Four second-order costs of abolition (centralisation, advisor-hub coupling, eager resource selection, bundleRules eviction)
Three concrete wins (keep-vs-null disappears at root, drift detectable at one point, clarifying_question already shipped)
Abolition is a tier-split (cold advisor + hot advisor-loaded vocab), not a deletion

direction: Set every defaultMode to null as abolition
reason: That is the run-1/run-2 answer wearing a wig; abolition only counts if routerPolicy/routerSignals/bundleRules/defaultResource are also deleted
Lexical regex works for deep-loops only because their trigger vocabulary is small and stable

note: Abolition makes the advisor the single deferrer; deferral is a clarifying-question, not a handoff. Iteration 3 should stress whether deferral is even the right primitive.
